name: Generate PDF
description: Generate a PDF document from HTML content or a public URL. Supports custom page sizes, fonts, margins, viewport dimensions, dynamic parameter substitution, and multiple output formats.

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL of the webpage to convert to PDF

fields.name: html_content
fields.description: HTML content to convert to PDF. Either url or html_content must be provided.

fields.name: css_content
fields.description: Optional CSS to apply to the HTML

fields.name: output_format
fields.description: Output format for the generated PDF

fields.name: landscape
fields.description: Set to true for landscape orientation

fields.name: displayHeaderFooter
fields.description: Whether to display header and footer

fields.name: preferCSSPageSize
fields.description: Whether to prefer CSS-defined page size

fields.name: margin
fields.description: Custom margins with top, right, bottom, left values (e.g. '10mm')

fields.name: page_size
fields.description: Maximum number of pages to generate (tier-dependent)

fields.name: wait_till
fields.description: Time to wait in seconds before generating PDF

fields.name: dynamic_params
fields.description: Key-value pairs for {{placeholder}} substitution in HTML

fields.name: output_filename
fields.description: Custom filename for the output PDF
